title: tecoma integra
intro: Tecoma integra, also known as the Yellow Trumpet Tree or Yellow Bells, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tecoma integra include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
